name: OSN Texas LLC
description_short: OS National is a title insurance and escrow company serving the Dallas-Fort Worth area with residential and commercial closing services, remote notarization, and earnest money solutions.
description_long:
OS National (OSN) operates as a title and escrow services provider with a national footprint and local expertise in the Dallas-Fort Worth region. The company was founded on the principle of modernizing how title companies operate to better serve the real estate industry and its customers. In 2024, OS National was acquired by Opendoor, expanding its reach and resources. The company positions itself as a boutique national agency offering personalized service to homebuyers, sellers, real estate professionals, lenders, investors, and commercial purchasers.

OS National's primary services include title insurance, escrow management, and closing coordination for residential and commercial transactions. They handle resales, new construction, refinances, and relocations. The company offers Remote Online Notarization (RON) to accommodate parties in different locations, an OSN Pay app for earnest money deposits, and OSN Checks for electronic commission delivery to real estate agents. Their Dallas location is at 6860 North Dallas Parkway, Suite 200, Plano, TX 75024, with phone support at 972-797-9900 (Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:30 PM).

OS National distinguishes itself through claimed local market knowledge, personalized service tailored to transaction type, and a stated commitment to treating customers as business partners rather than transactions. They emphasize understanding local real estate nuances, keeping current with regulations, and providing expert guidance at every closing stage. Their multiple office locations aim to provide convenience for customers and their clients during closings.

As a title and escrow company, OS National is correctly categorized under mortgages services. However, consumers should understand that this is not a mortgage lender—they facilitate the closing process after loan approval. The company's value proposition relies heavily on service quality and local expertise, which are subjective and difficult to verify independently from their marketing materials. Their recent acquisition by Opendoor represents a significant ownership change that may influence service delivery and priorities going forward.
address: 5307 E Mockingbird Ln suite 221, Dallas, TX 75206

company_info.headquarters: 5307 E Mockingbird Ln suite 221, Dallas, TX 75206

pros: Offers Remote Online Notarization (RON) enabling closings when parties are geographically dispersed
Multiple DFW locations designed for customer and client convenience during closings
OSN Pay app allows earnest money deposits without bank trips or coordination logistics
OSN Checks solution provides electronic commission delivery specifically for real estate agents
Services span both residential and commercial transactions, new construction, refinances, and relocations
Emphasizes personalized service tailored to specific transaction types and customer circumstances
Part of national title insurance network with local market expertise claims
cons: Not a mortgage lender—they only handle closing and escrow services after loan approval
Service quality claims are subjective and cannot be independently verified from marketing materials alone
Recent acquisition by Opendoor (2024) may signal potential changes to service model or priorities
Website does not provide transparent pricing or fee schedules for title or closing services
Limited third-party review data available to assess actual customer experience versus marketing claims
best_for: Homebuyers and sellers in the Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan area needing title and closing services
Real estate agents and professionals seeking commission payment and closing coordination solutions
Commercial real estate buyers, sellers, and borrowers requiring escrow and title expertise
Remote buyers or sellers who cannot attend in-person closings and need notarization services
diagnosis: OS National is best for Dallas-Fort Worth area homebuyers, sellers, and commercial parties seeking title insurance and closing coordination services. The primary caveat is that they are not a mortgage lender—they facilitate closings after loan approval—and their service quality claims are marketing-based without independent verification available through their website.
services: Closing coordination for resales, new construction, refinances, and relocations
OSN Pay app for earnest money deposits and payments
OSN Checks electronic commission delivery for real estate agents
Closing expertise and guidance for homebuyers, sellers, and borrowers
Local market knowledge and regulatory guidance
Multiple office locations for in-person closing coordination
Customer education resources (Title Basics, Homebuying Process guides, FAQ, videos)
